identity.mission: Create a premium, high-stakes betting environment that feels like a luxury fintech dashboard mixed with a night stadium atmosphere.
principles: Content: Data is the art. Odds are the hero.
Contrast: Deepest Blacks vs. Electric Gold/Green

typography.instructions: Use Oswald for all Headings, Scores, and Team Names (Condensed, aggressive). Use Manrope for all UI text, odds, and metadata (Clean, legible).

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-oswald font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
scale.label: text-xs font-manrope font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-500

grid_system.sidebar: col-span-2 hidden lg:flex flex-col h-screen sticky top-0 border-r border-neutral-900 bg-[#080808]
grid_system.betslip: col-span-3 hidden xl:flex flex-col h-screen sticky top-0 border-l border-neutral-900 bg-[#080808]

match_card.style: Bento Grid Style. Dark card (#0A0A0A) with 1px border (#262626). Hover effect: Border turns Gold (#D4AF37) with subtle glow.
elements: Team Logos: Large, centered or split.
Live Indicator: Pulsing Green dot + 'LIVE' text.
Odds: Row of 3 buttons (Home/Draw/Away) at bottom.

sidebar_nav.item_style: Flex row, gap-4, p-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-neutral-900 transition-all group
sidebar_nav.icons: Use Lucide React icons (Trophy, Activity, Calendar).

betslip.style: Receipt style. White background? NO. Keep it Dark. #0A0A0A.
betslip.item: Dismissible cards with odds multiplier highlighted.

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-gold_hover rounded-sm
buttons.odds: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 hover:border-gold hover:text-gold transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-2 rounded-sm

assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Icons: Trophy (Sports), Activity (Live), Calendar (Schedule), Wallet (Balance), User (Profile).

do_not: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid deep blacks.
Do NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use rounded-sm or rounded-md for a 'sharp' precision look.
Do NOT center text. Left align most content for readability.
must_do: MUST use 'Oswald' font for all numbers (scores, odds, money).
MUST add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
MUST implement a 'Live' pulsing effect for live matches.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'Oswald' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css. 2. Configure Tailwind colors with the 'Midnight Gold' palette. 3. Build the Layout (Sidebar, Main, Right). 4. Create the MatchCard component first - it is the core of the app. 5. Use the provided images for the category headers.
